ReportIssuePage.title: Report an issue
ReportIssuePage.subtitle: Help us improve REPUTEXA — every report is reviewed by our engineering team within 4 business hours.
ReportIssuePage.slaBanner: Response target: 4 business hours for critical · 24h for other priorities.
ReportIssuePage.issueTitlePlaceholder: E.g. Google reviews for location X stopped syncing
ReportIssuePage.descriptionPlaceholder: What happened vs. what you expected…
ReportIssuePage.stepsPlaceholder:
1. Open dashboard
2. Go to Reviews
3. See error…
ReportIssuePage.footerNote: Each report is acknowledged. SLA: 4 business hours for critical incidents.
ReportIssuePage.toastSelect: Choose an issue type and a priority.
ReportIssuePage.successSubtitle: Thank you — our team has been notified.
ReportIssuePage.successLine: We’ll reach you at {email} within 4 business hours with an update.
ReportIssuePage.successFoot: For production-critical incidents, support prioritizes your ticket.
